prestazioni: Engine swap to AMC 401 V8 (engine code: AMX-401) with forged internals including Eagle H-beam connecting rods (PN: CRS6125), JE forged pistons (PN: 229980), and a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy camshaft (PN: 32-600-4) for a 248°/254° duration and .510/.515 lift, paired with a Holley Sniper EFI intake manifold (PN: 550-511) and MSD 6AL ignition system (PN: 6425)

Custom turbocharged setup using a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (PN: 771340-5001S) with a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate (PN: MVR44) and Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve (PN: Q-50), feeding into a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with Burns Stainless merge collectors (PN: 172503) and MagnaFlow Competition Series mufflers (PN: 15160)

Suspension overhaul with Global West tubular upper and lower control arms (PN: AMC-101-U & AMC-101-L), QA1 double-adjustable coilovers (PN: AMC-200-X), and a Hellwig front sway bar (PN: 7108) paired with a custom rear sway bar from Addco (PN: 963, custom bent for Gremlin X)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using fiberglass fender flares from Vintage Car Customs (PN: VCC-AMC-GREMLIN-FLARES) with a 3-inch rear stretch, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser from RK Sport (custom fabricated for Gremlin X)

Full custom interior with Recaro SRD bucket seats (PN: 391.20.00) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (PN: 0111202111), and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (PN: AMC-GREMLIN-CAGE, 8-point chromoly)

Custom paint scheme in PPG Vibrance Collection 'Inferno Orange' (PN: VC5197) with matte black accents, including a custom hood scoop from Goodmark Industries (PN: 503-1007-103) and retro-inspired 'Gremlin X' decals from Slick Graphics (custom design)
